# CWE-502: JSON unmarshaled into validated DTO with explicit field checks.
lang: go
file: CWE-502-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type roleChangeRequest struct {
	UserID uint   `json:"user_id"`
	Grant  string `json:"grant"`
}

func ApplyPrivilege(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var req roleChangeRequest
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	if req.Grant != "viewer" && req.Grant != "editor" {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid grant")
		return
	}
	db.Exec("UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", req.Grant, req.UserID)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
